mechanism: Crowded positioning (+1.8σ overweights, 89th percentile copper longs) creates near-term vulnerability to price drawdowns without invalidating the multi-year structural tightness thesis, but raises the return hurdle for new entrants
regime_dependence: Positioning crowding is a near-term (3-12 month) signal; structural tightness operates on a multi-year horizon. The signals can diverge significantly across timeframes
